dialogueChunks.intro: The trail to {location_hint} is more dangerous than we expected. {enemy_type} patrols are everywhere, and they've set traps along the path.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: You'll need to fight through their scouts before reaching {quest_focus_the}. {quest_ally} warned that {quest_threat_the} grows stronger the closer you get to their territory.
dialogueChunks.outro: Clear the way and press forward. Every moment wasted is another moment {quest_focus_the} remains in danger.

dialogueChunks.intro: You've found signs of {quest_threat_the} near {location_hint}. Discarded supplies and cold fire pits mark where they rested with their prisoners.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: The captors split into groups here. Tracks branch in two directions. One set leads deeper toward {location_hint}, the other circles back. We need proof of where they went: gather what they left behind.
dialogueChunks.outro: Search the area thoroughly. What you find could tell us how many we're dealing with and where {quest_focus_the} was taken next.

dialogueChunks.intro: Something doesn't add up. The {enemy_type} knew too much about {quest_focus_the}: patrol schedules, weak points, who to target. Someone from the inside fed them information.
dialogueChunks.plotStep: Talk to {target_npc}. They were the last person to see {quest_focus_the} before {quest_threat_the} struck. Whether they're guilty or simply the last witness, their account matters.
dialogueChunks.outro: We need the truth before {quest_stakes_the} {quest_stakes_is} lost forever. Find out what {target_npc} knows, willingly or not.
